title.en: As long as the initial integration is carried o...

content.en:
Subsequently.

After Ye Tian picked up some true dragon blood and marrow fluid and swallowed it, he began to guide the energy into his immeasurable bones, trying to introduce the power of the Extreme Technique, an immeasurable supernatural technique, into his whole body, trying to fuse with his whole body.

Even if he had already practiced the Extreme Technique, there was a risk of failure in doing so.

Time passed slowly, and the power of the Extreme Technique gradually began to merge with the whole body.

As long as the initial integration is carried out, the risk is overcome.

However, just as he was about to fuse, his body began to crumble gradually, and he stopped fusing in time, so that he did not fall.

However, the replica body has been scrapped.

"Let's get another replica body!"

Ye Tian quickly re-copied a replica body and dismantled the scrapped replica body.

Keep practicing!

This time, he failed to cultivate again, so he began his third cultivation.

I have to say that it is too difficult for the extreme technique to fuse the whole body.

If it was replaced with a ten-armed golden body or a sky-killing blade, I am afraid that it would have succeeded a long time ago!

Finally, in the third cultivation, the power of the Extreme Technique was initially fused with the whole body.

Initial fusion is just the beginning, if you want to break through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm, you must completely fuse.

Therefore, Ye Tian swallowed drop after drop of True Dragon Blood Myeloid Liquid, helping himself to slowly improve his whole body from the initial fusion of the Extreme Technique, and strive to completely fuse as soon as possible.

Time flies.

The degree of fusion between the Pole Technique and Ye Tian's whole body is getting higher and higher, and it is getting closer and closer to breaking through the Heavenly Ancestor Realm.

"According to my understanding, other Great Ancestors can break through with at most ten drops of True Dragon Blood Marrow, even if it is a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, thirty-four drops of True Dragon Blood Myeloid can also break through, but I have consumed hundreds of drops of True Dragon Blood Myela!" Ye Tian muttered.

A True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone could refine several drops of True Dragon Blood Marrow Liquid, which meant that he had already consumed hundreds of True Dragon Blood Marrow Stones.

If it were other Heavenly Ancestors, they wouldn't be able to take out so many True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones!

Soon, Ye Tian refined a few more drops of True Dragon Blood Marrow Liquid.

Rumble!!!

His body completely fused with the power of the Extreme Technique, causing a metamorphosis of his physical body.

This is a sign of promotion!

"It's finally time to break through!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Once the breakthrough is successful, he will be a Heavenly Ancestor, and at that time, his strength will be far beyond the fifth stage of the Boundary Level, and his strength will definitely crush the other Heavenly Ancestors.

Rumble!!!!

The endless energy around him poured into his body, and many resources were taken out by him one by one to fill the energy needs, and he was still asking for energy, causing changes in the outside world.

Suddenly, many great ancestors in the Xuanqi Realm looked in the direction of the Ruins Stone Tower.

"That position, is the Endless Great Ancestor breaking through?"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

He knew that Ye Tian was a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, and it was very difficult for a Great Ancestor of this realm to become a Heavenly Ancestor.

But once it breaks through, the increase in strength is unimaginable.

If Ye Tian breaks through, even if his strength is not as good as Dongao Tianzu, it will definitely not be much worse!

Swish!!!!

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor came to the outside of the Ruins Stone Tower for the first time, and the Taichen Heavenly Ancestor and they also came here.

"Sure enough, it is a sign of a breakthrough to the Heavenly Ancestor, and the movement of this breakthrough is too big, the energy of the entire Xuanqi Territory is flowing here, and even the energy of an area of the Infinite Realm Ruins has poured in!"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor secretly said.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, this is the Endless Great Ancestor breaking through to become a Heavenly Ancestor, right?" Taichen Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Hmm!"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor nodded.

Taichen Heavenly Ancestor sighed with emotion: "I didn't expect the Endless Ancestor to break through so quickly, I thought he would be trapped in the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level Great Ancestor for a long time!"

Since Ye Tian's breakthrough process did not end so quickly, Taichen Heavenly Ancestor and the others still left.

After Ye Tian's breakthrough was over, they would come to visit again.

And the news that Ye Tian had broken through and became a Heavenly Ancestor spread.

Universal Alliance.

Many Great Ancestors were chatting about the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough on the Huanyu space-time network, and they were all extremely shocked, after all, in their impressions, Ye Tian had not joined the Huanyu Alliance for too long.

Last time, Ye Tian's stepping into the Boundary Breaking Level was enough to shock them, and as a result, he had stepped into the Heavenly Ancestor Realm so quickly.

Ye Tian became a Heavenly Ancestor, which meant that he was going to break away from the Universal Alliance, this was the rule.

......

Wanlong's territorial waters, the real night territory.

At this time.

The True Night Ancestor also knew the information about Ye Tian's breakthrough, and he immediately looked jealous.

"Endless Great Ancestor, he actually broke through, this guy definitely got a great opportunity in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, otherwise he wouldn't have been able to break through so quickly!" True Night Great Ancestor said jealously.

It has been a long time since he became the Fifth Stage Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level, how long has it been since Ye Tiancai broke through the Boundary Breaking Level? Why is it not him who has broken through, but Ye Tian!

So, he was very unconvinced!

Hayabusa Dragon City.

Dongao Tianzu also learned the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough, Ye Tian was not qualified to let him pay attention to it before, but now he has to pay attention to it.

"Endless Great Ancestor broke through to become a Heavenly Ancestor, I don't know how his current strength compares to mine?" Dongao Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

Before you know it, a period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's aura began to converge, he had completely broken through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm, and his strength was far surpassing.

Whew!!

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor and Taichen Heavenly Ancestor they came to visit.

"Come in, everybody!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, forming a golden channel, allowing the Blood Gu Heavenly Ancestor and Tianchen Heavenly Ancestor to come in.

"Congratulations to the Endless Heavenly Ancestor on the success of the breakthrough!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Heavenly Ancestor on the success of the breakthrough!"

Several Heavenly Ancestors congratulated.

"You're welcome!"

Ye Tian smiled.

However, it wasn't just these Heavenly Ancestors who congratulated, but more and more Heavenly Ancestors descended from the outside world to the Xuanqi Realm to congratulate Ye Tian on his breakthrough.

As for those invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors, they were not qualified to see Ye Tian now.

Ye Tian entertained these Heavenly Ancestors, and immediately sent them away on the grounds that they needed to stabilize the realm.

The ruins of the true dragon realm.

Ye Tian quickly replaced the copy body with the Heavenly Ancestor level, and then prepared to find a Heavenly Ancestor-level creature to test his strength.

"Why don't you just find that 10,000-eyed snake!"

Ye Tian decided.

Soon, he came to the territory of the Thousand-Eyed Serpent and searched for its traces.

It didn't take long for him to find the 10,000-eyed snake.

At this moment, the 10,000-eyed snake squatted in front of a green cave entrance, constantly absorbing the green aura emanating from the cave entrance, and this green aura could promote its cultivation and improvement.

When Ye Tian arrived, the 10,000-eyed snake turned its head and let out an angry roar.
